description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-checkbox

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 90 (A)
**Known issues:** formAssociated, _internals, _inputEl, _hasErrorSlot, _id, _helpTextId, _errorId, _labelId — all missing descriptions.

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Checkmark, border, background. States (checked, indeterminate, disabled, error). Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Proper label association. Indeterminate state. Error state announcements. Required indicator.
3. **Functionality** — Checked/unchecked/indeterminate. Form integration (ElementInternals). Validation. Error/help text slots. Required.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. formAssociated. ElementInternals. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Custom checkmark styling. Focus-ring. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix all 8 missing descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. States. Form integration. Validation. Keyboard (Space).
8. **Storybook** — All states. Error. Help text. Indeterminate.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Form API integration. Twig attributes.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-checkbox
